attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , 1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
   ,'CXCE_MAP_COUNTRY_THEATER' ALLOCATION_TYPE
   ,0 AS SR_COST
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
  ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_MKT_SGMT_SCMS_MAP SCMS_MAP
  ON SCMS_MAP.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT=TAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_CST_THTR_SL1_MAP SL1_MAP
  ON SL1_MAP.C3_CUST_THEATER=TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME
  INNER JOIN (
 SELECT  DISTINCT 
 ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SL1
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 CNTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='Americas' THEN 'AMERICAS'  
       WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='APJC__' THEN 'APJC' 
	   WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='EMEAR-REGION' THEN 'EMEA' 
	   ELSE RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
	   END AS SL1-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY ON CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
  --AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE.  10/29:remove because it cause data explosion for SR
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
 )A
WHERE  A.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=A.SL1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
 )  CCM_MAP_REF
  ON  ( CCM_MAP_REF.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=TAC.SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD 
   --AND CCM_MAP_REF.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME = SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME 
  AND CCM_MAP_REF.SL1=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME -- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
  ) 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK  WHERE ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY   )

SELECT
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'DIRECT_MAP_USING_CONTRACT' ALLOCATION_TYPE
,SUM(TAC.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT
+TAC.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT
+TAC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT
+TAC.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT) SR_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_REV_MAPPING_DATA GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO
ON GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NOTE_TXT = TAC.SRC_RPTD_SERVICE_CONTARCT_NUM
and GL_REV_DRIVER_RATIO.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

SELECT 
  CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , 1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
   ,'CXCE_MAP_SCMS_COUNTRY_THEATER' ALLOCATION_TYPE
   ,0 AS SR_COST
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
  ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.SCMS_FINAL SCMS  /*Added this on 27/04/2021 to check market segment key from RMA to SR based on end customer*/
  ON SCMS.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME=TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
  AND TAC.SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD =SCMS.SRC_RPTD_SITE_CNTRY_NAME
  AND TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME = SCMS.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME
 --and SCMS.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT = TAC.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
  AND TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=SCMS.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_MKT_SGMT_SCMS_MAP SCMS_MAP
  ON SCMS_MAP.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT=SCMS.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_CST_THTR_SL1_MAP SL1_MAP
  ON SL1_MAP.C3_CUST_THEATER=TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME
  INNER JOIN(
 SELECT DISTINCT SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SL1
 FROM (
 SELECT RSH.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE
 ,RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,CNTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  ,CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='Americas' THEN 'AMERICAS'  
       WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='APJC__' THEN 'APJC' 
	   WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='EMEAR-REGION' THEN 'EMEA' 
	   ELSE RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
	   END AS SL1-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY ON CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
 -- AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK' -- 10/29:remove because it cause data explosion for SR
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
 )A  WHERE  A.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=A.SL1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
)  CCM_MAP_REF
  ON   CCM_MAP_REF.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE=SCMS_MAP.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE 
  AND CCM_MAP_REF.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=TAC.SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD 
   --AND CCM_MAP_REF.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME = SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME 
  AND CCM_MAP_REF.SL1=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK  WHERE ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY  )

SELECT 
    CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , 1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
   ,'CXCE_MAP_THEATER' ALLOCATION_TYPE
   ,0 AS SR_COST
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
  ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_CST_THTR_SL1_MAP SL1_MAP
  ON SL1_MAP.C3_CUST_THEATER=TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME
 INNER JOIN   (
 SELECT  DISTINCT 
 DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SL1
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 RSH.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    ,CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='Americas' THEN 'AMERICAS'  
       WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='APJC__' THEN 'APJC' 
	   WHEN L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR='EMEAR-REGION' THEN 'EMEA' 
	   ELSE RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR
	   END AS SL1 -- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY ON CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
 -- AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE. 10/29:remove because it cause data explosion for SR
 GROUP BY 1,2,3
 )A
WHERE  A.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=A.SL1 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
)  CCM_MAP_REF 
  ON  ( --CCM_MAP_REF.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME 
  CCM_MAP_REF.SL1=SL1_MAP.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME-- ADDED THIS TO MAKE SL1 AND C3 IN SYNC
  ) 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK  WHERE ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY   )

SELECT 
  CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
 ,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,CCM_MAP_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , 1 SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
   ,'CXCE_MAP_COUNTRY' ALLOCATION_TYPE
   ,0 AS SR_COST
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
  ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_C3_MKT_SGMT_SCMS_MAP SCMS_MAP
  ON SCMS_MAP.C3_MARKET_SEGMENT=TAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME
 INNER JOIN (
 SELECT  DISTINCT 
 ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 ,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 CNTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
 ,RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SUM(COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT) TSS_REV
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_PNL_REV_COST_MEASURE  MSR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=MSR.BK_TRNGLTD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNTRY ON CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=RSH.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
	INNER JOIN (SELECT CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,RFISCAL.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER, RFISCAL.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER,CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT   
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFISCAL  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CTRL_FISCAL
ON  CTRL_FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=RFISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AND CTRL_FISCAL.MONTH_RANK=1) REV_MTH
ON 1=1 
WHERE MSR.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  BETWEEN REV_MTH.FISCAL_QTR_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER AND   REV_MTH.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER
  AND MSR.DV_PRODUCT_TYPE='SERVICE'
 AND MSR.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD ='REVENUE'
 AND MSR.DV_PNL_REV_COST_TYPE= 'TSS_REVENUE'
 AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME LIKE 'TS%' AND DV_PNL_LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT IN ('TS REVENUE_MANADJ')
  -- AND CNTRY.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE <> 'UNK'-- ADDED THIS RULE . 10/29:remove because it cause data explosion for SR
 GROUP BY 1,2
 )A
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE  ORDER	BY TSS_REV DESC) =1
)  CCM_MAP_REF
  ON  ( CCM_MAP_REF.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=TAC.SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD  )
  WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK  WHERE ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY   )

SELECT
 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
 ,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
 ,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , SR_PCT
 ,'EC_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
 , SUM(SR_COST) SR_COST
FROM (
SELECT 
TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,VT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(VT.SR_PCT,0) SR_PCT
,SUM(TAC.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT
+TAC.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT
+TAC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT
+TAC.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT) SR_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST  TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SR_PCT FROM VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT_2) VT 
ON TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME =VT.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME 
AND TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=VT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE END_CUST_ENRICHMENT_MTHOD_NAME IN ( 'EC_DIRECT_MAP_IB') and
TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY NOT IN (SELECT SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) A 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
attributes.Pre SQL:
CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT_2 AS (
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SR_COST
,NULLIFZERO(SUM(SR_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY))/NULLIFZERO(SUM(SR_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME)) SR_PCT -- TAKING ALL STK , HENCE CALCULATING ALLOCATION PCT
FROM
(SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SR.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM(SR_COST) SR_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY SR
--INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH 
--ON	SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SR.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)
--where FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = 202110
AND DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME<>'N/A'
AND ALLOCATION_TYPE IN ( 'IB_BASED')
AND SR_COST >0
GROUP BY 1,2,3 )A
GROUP BY 1,2,3,SR_COST,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
)WITH DATA
ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;  --0

COLLECT STATS ON VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT_2 COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME);
COLLECT STATS ON VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT_2 COLUMN (FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);
COLLECT STATS ON VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT_2 COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SR_PCT AS SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'IB_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
, SUM(SR_COST) SR_COST
FROM (
SELECT 
SR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,SR.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,SR.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,COALESCE(IB.IP_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,1 AS SR_PCT
,SUM(SR.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT
+SR.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT
+SR.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT
+SR.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT) SR_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST SR
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = SR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN SL_SR_IB_BASED RSN
ON SR.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT=RSN.SRC_RPTD_SR_NUMBER_INT
LEFT JOIN IB IB
 ON IB.DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM = RSN.BK_CUST_RPRTD_PRD_SERIAL_NUM
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH 
ON (SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=IB.IP_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AND 
SH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('MISC-MISCL1','INTERNAL NON-REVENUE','EUROPEAN MARKETS','WW Distribution')) 
WHERE SR.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY NOT IN (SELECT SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
IN( SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)) GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) A 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

SELECT
 FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
 ,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
 ,SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
 ,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
 ,DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 , SR_PCT
 ,'EC_BASED' ALLOCATION_TYPE
 , SUM(SR_COST) SR_COST
FROM (
SELECT 
TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,VT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(VT.SR_PCT,0) SR_PCT
,SUM(TAC.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT
+TAC.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT
+TAC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT
+TAC.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT) SR_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST  TAC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
 ON CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, SR_PCT FROM VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT) VT 
ON TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME =VT.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME 
AND TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=VT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
WHERE END_CUST_ENRICHMENT_MTHOD_NAME IN ( 'EC_DIRECT_MAP_CONTRACT_1:1' ,'EC_DIRECT_MAP_CONTRACT_1:M') and
TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY NOT IN (SELECT SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY 
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL))
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6) A 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
attributes.Pre SQL:
CREATE MULTISET VOLATILE TABLE VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT AS (
SELECT
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SR_COST
,NULLIFZERO(SUM(SR_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY))/NULLIFZERO(SUM(SR_COST) OVER (PARTITION BY DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME)) SR_PCT -- TAKING ALL STK , HENCE CALCULATING ALLOCATION PCT
FROM
(SELECT
(SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL) AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,SR.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM(SR_COST) SR_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY SR
--INNER JOIN COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY SH 
--ON	SH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = SR.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT IN (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL)
--where FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = 202110
AND DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME<>'N/A'
AND ALLOCATION_TYPE IN ( 'DIRECT_MAP_USING_CONTRACT')
AND SR_COST >0
GROUP BY 1,2,3 )A
GROUP BY 1,2,3,SR_COST,DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
)WITH DATA
ON COMMIT PRESERVE ROWS;  --0

COLLECT STATS ON VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME);
COLLECT STATS ON VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT COLUMN (FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);
COLLECT STATS ON VT_DIRECT_MAP_SR_PCT COLUMN (DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME,FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT);

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
,TAC.DV_END_CUSTOMER_NAME
,UNK_REF.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, UNK_REF.TAC_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO
,'UNKNOWN_ALLOCATION' ALLOCATION_TYPE
,0 AS SR_COST
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_UNK_SK_ALLOC UNK_REF /* TS COGS SL Enrichment changes */
ON CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME=UNK_REF.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SEL SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK WHERE ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY )

SELECT 
UNK_DRIVER.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
,UNK_DRIVER.THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT  
,SUM(UNK_DRIVER.THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT) OVER(PARTITION BY UNK_DRIVER.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME) TOTAL_THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT
,CAST(UNK_DRIVER.THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(27,14))/CAST(TOTAL_THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(27,14))  TAC_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO 
,UNK_DRIVER.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
FROM ( 
SELECT  UNK_DRIVER2.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,UNK_DRIVER2.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER2.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,UNK_DRIVER2.THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT 
,UNK_DRIVER2.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE   
FROM (
SELECT 
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  /* TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes */ 
,RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE   /* TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes */
,MAX(DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM((TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT+TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT+TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT +TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT    ) *ID_SLK.SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO  )   THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT  
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK
ON(TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY AND ALLOCATION_TYPE='DIRECT_MAP')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH
ON (RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ID_SLK.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    /* AND DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME IN ('Americas','APJC','EMEA')  */   /* TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes */  
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'WW Distribution'  ) /* TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes */
GROUP BY        
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
,RSH.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
) UNK_DRIVER2

UNION ALL
SELECT 
UNK_DRIVER1.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,UNK_DRIVER1.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME  
,UNK_DRIVER1.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,UNK_DRIVER1.THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT 
, ''  L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  FROM
(
SELECT 
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME
,MAX(DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY) DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SUM((TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT+TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT+TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT +TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT    ) *ID_SLK.SA_SLK_ALLOCATION_RATIO  )   THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT  
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SR_TECH_ASSISTANCE_CNTR_COST TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TS_MTH_QTR_CNTL CNTL
ON TAC.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
INNER JOIN   $$STGDB.WI_CCM_TAC_ID_SALES_TERR_KEY ID_SLK
ON(TAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY=ID_SLK.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY AND ALLOCATION_TYPE='DIRECT_MAP')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH
ON (RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=ID_SLK.DRVD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   /*  AND DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME IN ('Americas','APJC','EMEA')  */   /* TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes */ 
AND  RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <> 'WW Distribution')    /* TS COGS   SL Enrichment changes */
GROUP BY        
CNTL.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
) UNK_DRIVER1  ) UNK_DRIVER

QUALIFY TOTAL_THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT<>0 AND THEATRE_TAC_AMOUNT<>0
